order.title: Online Order
order.label: Order
order.filterRatingHint: Minimum 3.0 stars — low-rated restaurants are not listed
order.locationFallback: Location unavailable — distance calculated from {{city}} city centre.
order.voiceNoMatchHint: No matching venue found in online menus for "{{summary}}". Expand budget or distance limit.
order.loginRequiredBody: Log in to place an order.
order.emptyCart: Add at least one item to your cart.
order.closedBody: This restaurant is not accepting orders right now.
order.pendingBody: Your order has been sent to the restaurant. You cannot place a new order until it is confirmed.
order.privacyNote: Your phone and address will only be shared with this restaurant. Payment on delivery.
order.paymentMethodHint: Payment is collected at delivery by the restaurant or courier.
order.emptyListHint: Expand cuisine selection or set distance to 10 km.
order.emptyBrowseTitle: No online order restaurants near you yet
order.emptyBrowseHint: Coming very soon — check back from time to time.
order.voiceSearchHint: Voice or type — e.g. 150 TL lahmacun
order.voiceSearchPlaceholder: Say what you want for 150 TL
order.voiceOutsideCity: Also searched outside {{city}} — showing nearest matching venues.

auth.googleExpoWarning: Google sign-in doesn't work in Expo Go. Use an internal Play test or EAS build.
auth.kvkkLink: I have read the KVKK disclosure text
auth.kvkkConsentMid: and give explicit consent to the processing of my personal data under the
auth.consentRequiredForSignIn: Please check the privacy / KVKK consent box above before signing in.
auth.loginToViewOrders: Sign in with your Google account to view your orders.
auth.loginExpoGoNote: Google sign-in doesn't work in Expo Go. Use an internal Play test or TestFlight build.

deletion.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deletion.intro: This action is permanent. The following will happen; read before continuing:
deletion.step2SubBefore: To permanently delete your account, type
deletion.deletedMsg: Your personal data has been queued for processing. You can sign up again with the same Google account at any time.
deletion.pendingOrderError: Complete or cancel your pending order first, then try again.
deletion.panelOwnerError: Panel/restaurant owner accounts cannot be deleted here. Contact support.
deletion.genericError: Account could not be deleted. Please try again.
deletion.loss1: Your account information (email, name, profile photo) will be permanently deleted or anonymised.
deletion.loss2: Your GastroSkor reviews will be anonymised; text may remain for restaurant statistics.
deletion.loss3: Your GastroCoin balance and wallet record will be deleted.
deletion.loss4: Your friendships and private messages will be permanently deleted.
deletion.loss5: Your Gourmet chat messages will be marked as "[deleted]".
deletion.loss6: Personal details in completed order records will be anonymised (amounts/dates kept for legal retention).

gourmetProfile.title: Your Gourmet profile
gourmetProfile.sub: Choose a nickname and avatar so the community can recognise you in Gourmet Chats.
gourmetProfile.nicknameTooShort: Nickname must be at least 3 characters.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.sub: Your online order history and pending orders are listed here.
orders.empty: Your online order history will appear here.
orders.emptyHint: Orders you place through the Online Order flow will be listed here.
orders.errorAccount: Account could not be synced. Sign out and sign in again with Google.
orders.errorSession: Your session may have expired. Sign out and sign in again.
orders.errorNotFound: The order list is not available on the server yet. App is up to date; backend update coming soon.
orders.errorNetwork: Could not connect to the internet or server. Try again in a moment.
orders.errorGeneric: Orders could not be loaded right now. Pull down to refresh or try again in a few minutes.

profile.title: Account
profile.subtitle: Login, notifications and privacy settings. Following and friends in the Following tab.
profile.googleOnly: For security, you can only sign in with your Google account.
profile.signInHint: Sign in with Apple (above) or Google (below). Both options meet App Store login requirements.
profile.signInSteps: Step 1: Check the privacy consent box. Step 2: Tap Sign in with Apple or Google.
profile.reviewPrivacyHint: Default: how your name appears on new reviews (Full name or masked like ay***).
profile.tagline: Discover the best flavors near you.
profile.kvkkDataHint: Download and share your profile, orders, reviews and wallet data as JSON.
profile.shareNotAvailable: Sharing is not available on this device. File saved to app cache.
profile.dangerZoneHint: Permanently deleting your account cannot be undone. Use the Logout button above to sign out.

explore.socialEmpty: No results found in social search
explore.socialEmptyHint: Try switching to standard GastroSkor search — ranked by Google score and distance.
explore.socialLoginRequired: Sign in to use social proof mode.

settings.restartRequired: The app needs to restart to apply this change.

siparis.loginPrompt: Log in to view order details.
siparis.sessionExpired: Your session may have expired. Please sign in again.
siparis.loadFailed: Failed to load order details. Try again in a moment.

deliveryAddress.lead: Pick your delivery address from the official numbering list. If it is not listed, it is not registered yet.
deliveryAddress.incomplete: Select district, neighborhood, street and building number.
deliveryAddress.locationRequired: Location permission required to verify your delivery address.
deliveryAddress.emptyList: No entries at this level — check the selection above.

phone.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mobile number (e.g. 05xx xxx xx xx).
phone.description: A verified phone number and delivery address are required to place an order. The restaurant will call you on this number.
phone.setupDone: All set — you can return to the order screen.
phone.setupLoginRequired: Log in before entering order contact details.

rating.title: Rate
rating.description: Taste, service and courier are rated separately. The headline score is taste only.

voice.sheetPlaceholder: E.g. lahmacun under 150 TL within 1 km
voice.micSubcopy: Tap the mic and say what you want. Tap again when done — search starts. Budget is optional.
voice.micRecordingHint: Tap the mic again when done
voice.micIdleHint: Tap to speak; tap again when done
voice.micStopHint: Tap the mic again to finish speaking
voice.commandBarHint: Without choosing a restaurant: "3 lahmacun 1 ayran, under 400 TL" — finds the best match.
voice.commandBarHintOr: Or by letter: "From B: 3 lahmacun, cash on delivery".
voice.commandBarExample2: From B: 3 lahmacun, cash on delivery
voice.loginRequiredBody: Log in before placing an order.
voice.phoneRequired: SMS phone verification is required to place an order.
voice.addressRequired: Enter a delivery address (at least 10 characters).
voice.successBody: {{name}} will confirm your order from the panel. No call expected as your phone is verified.
voice.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mobile number (05xx xxx xx xx).

rezervasyon.title: Online Reservation
rezervasyon.emptyTitle: No reservation restaurants near you yet
rezervasyon.emptyBody: Coming very soon — check back from time to time.
rezervasyon.pilotStep1: 1. Restaurant enables online reservations from the panel
rezervasyon.pilotStep3: 3. GastroSkor showcase approval → appears in list
rezervasyon.vitrinPreviewHint: Approved restaurants appear like this — Atlas Sofra sample card.
rezervasyon.statusPendingBody: Your request has been sent to the restaurant panel. You'll be notified when approved; you then have 24 hours to confirm.
rezervasyon.statusApprovedBody: Your table is reserved. Confirm within 24 hours below; otherwise the table will be released.
rezervasyon.statusConfirmedBody: See you there — you can head to the restaurant.
rezervasyon.statusRejectedBody: The restaurant could not accept this request right now.
rezervasyon.statusExpiredBody: The table has been released because the confirmation window passed.
rezervasyon.loginBody: Please sign in to view your reservation.
rezervasyon.tableOccupied: This table is taken at the selected time.
rezervasyon.tableClosed: The restaurant has closed this table for reservations.
rezervasyon.tableCapacityHint: This table fits {{min}}–{{max}} guests. Update party size or choose another table.
rezervasyon.loginRequiredBody: Please sign in to make a reservation (Profile tab or developer login).
rezervasyon.requestSentBody: Wait for the restaurant to approve. You'll be notified; confirm within 24 hours.
rezervasyon.offlineBody: This restaurant is not accepting online reservations right now.
rezervasyon.tableUnavailable: Selected table is no longer available.
rezervasyon.selectTableBody: Choose a table code from the map.
rezervasyon.partySizeSubtitle: How many guests? Table capacity is color-coded accordingly.
rezervasyon.largeGroupHint: For groups over {{max}}, please contact the restaurant directly
rezervasyon.dateTimeSubtitle: Tables occupied at the selected time appear grey on the map.
rezervasyon.floorPlanSubtitle: Gold: selected · Green: available · Grey: occupied
rezervasyon.selectTableHint: Choose a table code from the map (e.g. S-M5).
rezervasyon.contactSubtitle: Request goes to the restaurant panel; confirmed with double approval.
rezervasyon.nameHint: Example: John Smith (first and last name separately)
rezervasyon.readyHint: Ready — you can submit your reservation request.
rezervasyon.confirmHint: Confirming sends the request to the restaurant panel and a notification.
rezervasyon.occupiedTimeHint: Tables occupied at the selected time appear grey on the map.
rezervasyon.bookTagline: Select table in hall · send request
rezervasyon.heroSubtitle: For an unforgettable special evening with friends
rezervasyon.heroCity: {{city}} · select table, send request — confirmed with double approval after restaurant approves.
rezervasyon.occasionHint: Single selection — helps the restaurant prepare. If not listed, use the note field.
rezervasyon.floorLegend: Table number on table · Gold: selected · Green: available · Grey: occupied

yoresel.title: Regional Delicacies
yoresel.subtitle: TÜRKPATENT-registered products. Tap to open a live Google search — GastroSkor does not endorse restaurants.
yoresel.emptySub: No geographically-indicated products are listed for this province yet. Try another province using the city selector above.
yoresel.searchEmpty: No live search results found for "{{query}}".
yoresel.detailEmpty: No live search results found for this delicacy.
yoresel.sectionSub: Geographically-indicated products from your selected province
yoresel.sectionEmpty: No regional products found for this province.

gunlukKelime.title: Daily Word
gunlukKelime.subtitle: Wordle-style · 5 letters · 6 attempts · one word per day
gunlukKelime.legendColors: ✅ Right spot · 🟨 Wrong spot · ⬜ Not in word
gunlukKelime.tdk5Harf: 5-letter Turkish words from the TDK dictionary.
gunlukKelime.oyunLegend: ⬜ Right box · 🟨 Letter present, wrong spot · ➡ Not in word
gunlukKelime.sozluktYok: Not in dictionary — try a valid 5-letter word
gunlukKelime.kelimeYuklenemedi: Daily word couldn't load — return to lobby and try again
gunlukKelime.oyunYuklenemedi: Game couldn't load — try again from the lobby
gunlukKelime.tahminIslenemedi: Guess couldn't be processed — try again

kelimeBul.title: Word Find
kelimeBul.subtitle: Word hunt · 10×10 · horizontal · vertical · diagonal
kelimeBul.rule1: 👆 Drag your finger over letters to select a word
kelimeBul.freeRemaining: You have {{n}} free plays left today
kelimeBul.guestFree: Guest: {{n}} free plays · then sign in + {{cost}} {{gc}}
kelimeBul.baglantıHatasi: Couldn't start the game. Try again in a moment.
kelimeBul.buKelimeListedeYok: That word isn't in the list

kelimeSofrasi.title: Word Table
kelimeSofrasi.subtitle: Letter wheel · crossword · ad-free
kelimeSofrasi.kural1: Form words from the letter wheel — each letter can only be used once.
kelimeSofrasi.kural3: If you get stuck, use a hint to reveal a random letter on the grid.
kelimeSofrasi.kural4Base: Each round brings new words and layout. You can play {{max}} rounds per day.
kelimeSofrasi.loadErrorHint: Couldn't load the table. Check your connection and try again.
kelimeSofrasi.msg2HarfMin: 2 letters isn't a word — enter a 3+ letter grid word
kelimeSofrasi.msgBonus1010: Bonus: {{word}} — 10/10! Tap the reward above the B badge
kelimeSofrasi.msgIzgaraTamam: Grid complete — you can still hunt for bonus words
kelimeSofrasi.msgBonusDegil: Not a bonus — try another word from the wheel letters
kelimeSofrasi.msgGecersizBonus: Invalid bonus — not in TDK or already on the grid
kelimeSofrasi.msgIpucuKazandin: +1 hint earned! Tap the light bulb.
kelimeSofrasi.sofraLimitTamam: Table complete! Today's quota is used up.
kelimeSofrasi.kalanIpucu: Hints left: {{n}} — can't be used after the grid is done

kelimeYarismasi.title: Word Race
kelimeYarismasi.subtitle: {{turSayisi}} rounds daily · timer runs while reading clue · ad-free
kelimeYarismasi.kural1: The race timer runs while you read the clue; it stops when you tap "Answer".
kelimeYarismasi.kural2: In answer mode you have {{cevapSure}} seconds; no points if time's up or wrong.
kelimeYarismasi.kural3: Ranked by score first, then shorter time wins ties.
kelimeYarismasi.kural4: Joker: reveals a random letter; each tap +{{jokerSure}} s (max +15 s per question); score = letters − jokers.
kelimeYarismasi.kural5: {{turSayisi}} rounds per day. Sunday 13 letters; Tue/Fri 12 letters; other days 4–11.
kelimeYarismasi.bankaHataMesaj: Please refresh the app or try again later.
kelimeYarismasi.ipucuNot: Read the clue; the race timer is running. Tap Answer when ready.
kelimeYarismasi.cevapVerAlt: Tapping stops the timer · {{sure}} s to type
kelimeYarismasi.jokerSureBitti: Time bonus used up (+15 s) · keep revealing letters

miniSudoku.title: Sudoku
miniSudoku.subtitle: Classic 9×9 · daily puzzle · row, column and 3×3 box rules
miniSudoku.kural1: Easy, medium and hard: same 9×9 grid — the difference is how many cells are pre-filled.
miniSudoku.kural2: Use note mode to mark candidate digits.
miniSudoku.otomatikTamamlaSub: {{n}} cells left — place the remaining digits
miniSudoku.canlarBittiBody: Try again when tomorrow's puzzle arrives. A token-based continue option will be added later.

rifki.loginBody: This game requires sign-in. You can sign in with Google on a Play / EAS build.
rifki.dusmanYaklasti: The enemy got too close. Give it another go!
